```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

cat(sep = "\n", c(
  if (dR$own$numberOfDepartments != "1") {
    c(
      paste0(sR$headerList$numberOfDepartments, ":"),
      "",
      paste0(":   ", dR$own$numberOfDepartments),
      ""
    )
  },
  paste0(sR$headerList$numberOfPatients, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR$own$numberOfPatients),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$numberOfAdmissions, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR$own$numberOfAdmissions,
    if (dR$own$numberOfAdmissions != dR$own$numberOfPatients)
      paste0(" (", sR$headerList$admissionsExceedRecordsNote, ")")
    else ""),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$sumOfPatientDays, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ", dR$own$sumOfPatientDays),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$averageSurveillancePeriod, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ",dR$own$averageSurveillancePeriod, " days")
))
```
